message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14
skinparam classFontSize 12
skinparam classFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeIconColor #4CAF50
skinparam classMethodIconColor #4CAF50
skinparam classIconColor #4CAF50
skinparam classIconSize 20
skinparam classIconPosition left
skinparam classIconPadding 5
skinparam classIconMargin 5
skinparam classIconAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classIcon......
' Note: The above skinparam settings are for styling. The actual diagram structure follows.

class Main {
}

class Banner {
  + void showWithParen()
  + void showWithAster()
}

class Print {
  <<interface>>
  + void printWeak()
  + void printStrong()
}

class PrintBanner {
  + void printWeak();
  + void printStrong();
}

Main --> Print : Uses
PrintBanner --|> Banner
PrintBanner ..|> Print

@enduml
